节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides interfaces to manage and use data networks.
Get an HTTP request task.
Get a TCPSocket object.
Get a UDPSocket object.
Create a network connection with optional netSpecifier and timeout. {@link NetConnection#netUnavailable} is called.
注释信息: @param { NetSpecifier } [netSpecifier] - Indicates the network specifier. See {@link NetSpecifier}.
@param { number } [timeout] - The time in milliseconds to attempt looking for a suitable network before
@returns { NetConnection } the NetConnection of the NetSpecifier.

parameters.说明: number } [timeout] - The time in milliseconds to attempt looking for a suitable network before

节点.return_description: the NetConnection of the NetSpecifier.

节点.功能描述:

the callback of setAppNet.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the default {@link HttpProxy} proxy settings. If an application level proxy is set, the application level proxy parameters are returned. If a global proxy is set, the global proxy parameters are returned. If the process is bound to a {@link NetHandle} using {@link setAppNet}, the {@link NetHandle} proxy settings are returned. In other cases, the proxy settings of default network are returned.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<HttpProxy> } callback - Returns the default {@link HttpProxy} settings.
@throws { BusinessError } 2100002 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Returns the default {@link HttpProxy} settings.

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the default {@link HttpProxy} proxy settings. If an application level proxy is set, the application level proxy parameters are returned. If a global proxy is set, the global proxy parameters are returned. If the process is bound to a {@link NetHandle} using {@link setAppNet}, the {@link NetHandle} proxy settings are returned. In other cases, the proxy settings of default network are returned.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<HttpProxy> } the promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 2100002 - Failed to connect to the service.
节点.return_description: the promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.
